captions: A camera saw Bosch leave home while Bosch was still asleep.

wake: Bosch, get up! You gotta see this!
Something came down on the hill. Meet me outside.
mifella-going-home: MiFella: I got my picture. Let's go home, Bosch.
MiFella: It's so late. We should be home and asleep.
home-scene: MiFella replays his photos of the crowd.
MiFella echoes the word once under his breath.
Everyone up there felt so together.
mifella-outside: MiFella: There you are! It came down on the hill, I watched it happen!
meteor-inspect: The meteor sits in its crater, still warm.
If you lean close, the hum almost sorts itself into a word.

phaseObjectives.bedroom: Answer MiFella. He is waiting outside.
phaseObjectives.meteor: See what fell on the hill.
